default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss ongoing projects, challenges, and next steps for Okta's growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/jwxGkUmR12RpxhQsn1abtrnZrbAQE15A?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

## Key Takeaways
